title: Ground mounted solar energy plants: predicted land use
body: "DESNZ response to a Freedom of Information (FOI) request dated 20 November 2025.  It provides data on:   calculations behind the government’s 0.4% figure the percentage of agricultural land this is equivalent to as a percentage of total UK utilised agricultural land   The request was considered in accordance with the Environmental Information Regulations 2004 (EIRs) as the information requested falls within the definition of ‘environmental information’.  "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
